body: Thanks so much for the quick follow-up, Amara — I really appreciated the time you both spent walking through the [CarbonLedger](carbonledger.co) deck last week. I've gone ahead and updated the financial model based on the feedback you shared around our customer acquisition assumptions in the industrial segment, and I think the revised numbers tell a much cleaner story about the path to Series-A. I also wanted to flag that we closed our third enterprise pilot last Friday, which we hadn't anticipated announcing until Q3, so the timing feels meaningful. Would it be possible to get 30 minutes on the calendar sometime in the next two weeks to walk through the updated projections together? I'd love to have [Halfway Capital](halfway.vc) eyes on this before we formally open the round. Looking forward to hearing your thoughts.
